name: Neighborhood Progress Fund
message: Neighborhood Progress Fund is a nonprofit group that offers small business loans and business development services to entrepreneurs and businesses in distressed communities. We’ve served the Greater Philadelphia Area for twenty years to help stimulate economic growth throughout the region.https://npfp.org/Liberty Square, West Tower1300 W.
